prompt: Based on the theme and the vibe of the image provided, create a typography list that list out all the alphabets from A to Z and a to z. The background should be a pure white background.
prompt_refined: Generate a full typography list of all uppercase (A-Z) and lowercase (a-z) English alphabet letters. The typography should reflect the whimsical, cartoonish, and monster-themed artistic style observed in image 1, similar to the Hotel Transylvania aesthetic. Arrange the letters clearly and legibly as a list, ensuring all characters are prominently displayed. The background must be a pure, solid white.
objects: Letters rendered in whimsical, cartoonish, and monster-themed style
